color-ink-600.comment: canonical Ink — warm near-black, text and borders

color-red-300.comment: confetti brand Red, lifted enough to read AS TEXT on the dark surface (4.69:1)

color-pine-300.comment: brand, lifted enough to read AS TEXT on the forest dark surface

color-pine-500.comment: Adventure brand green — reads as text on sand (4.8:1) and as button fill w/ white (6.6:1)

color-grape-900.comment: neon light text / border — deep purple

color-glow-100.comment: neon dark text / border — light lavender

shadow-hard-ink.comment: hard offset shadow — the sticker lift, no blur

shadow-hard-cream.comment: dark-mode counterpart — light offset against dark surfaces

shadow-button-lift.comment: buttons do NOT lift — they brighten on hover instead

effect-button-hover-brightness.comment: hover lightness multiplier for buttons that change lightness instead of lifting

motion-tilt-subtle.comment: outer bound of the hand-placed sticker tilt — components scale this by a per-instance multiplier in -1..1

motion-tilt-max.comment: outer bound of the hand-placed sticker angle

motion-transform-lift.comment: how far an interactive surface rises on hover

motion-button-lift.comment: the hover transform on filled buttons — a lift, or rest (no move), per theme

font-size-display.comment: hero only — fluid, sits above h1

font-size-h6.comment: meets body size — weight and family carry the distinction

size-icon-sm.comment: 16px — inline with body and control labels
